title: Rebuild Coal & Curry as South Indian Multi-Cuisine Restaurant App

requirements.summary: Apply warm South Indian-inspired visual theme with saffron, turmeric, deep red, cream, and dark charcoal palette throughout the app
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses saffron, turmeric, deep red, and cream tones consistently across all pages
Typography uses a bold, legible display font appropriate for a restaurant brand
No blue or purple colors appear in the UI

file_operations.description: Update CSS custom properties to replace coal/maroon theme with warm South Indian palette: saffron (#FF9933), turmeric (#FFC107), deep red (#C41E3A), cream (#FFF8E7), dark charcoal (#2C2C2C). Remove any blue/purple color definitions. Update text color variables to ensure readability against the new palette.

Replace the existing coal/maroon/gold color scheme with South Indian-inspired colors: saffron, turmeric, deepRed, cream, charcoal. Update shadow and border utilities to use the new palette. Ensure no blue or purple colors remain in the configuration.
Update Navbar styling to use the new saffron/turmeric/cream color scheme. Apply warm background colors and ensure text contrast meets accessibility standards with the new palette.
Update Footer styling to use deep red or dark charcoal background with cream text. Apply the South Indian color palette to links, borders, and accents.
Update hero section styling to use warm overlay colors (saffron/turmeric gradients) and cream text. Ensure CTA buttons use the new palette with strong visual hierarchy.

requirements.summary: Build complete South Indian multi-cuisine menu with 9 categories containing 4-6 realistic dishes each, stored in frontend menuData.ts
acceptanceCriteria: At least 9 menu categories are available
Each dish displays name, description, price, spice level, and veg/non-veg indicator
Sample dishes include items like Masala Dosa, Idly Sambar, Chettinad Chicken, Fish Curry, Filter Coffee, Payasam, etc.
Menu data is stored in frontend menuData.ts

file_operations.description: Replace the existing Chettinad menu with a comprehensive South Indian multi-cuisine menu containing 9 categories: Starters, Dosas & Uttapam, Idly & Vada, Rice & Biryani, Curries & Gravies, Breads, Seafood Specials, Desserts, and Drinks. Each category must contain 4-6 authentic South Indian dishes with name, description, price (in INR), spice level (1-5), and veg/non-veg flag. Use generated images from frontend/public/assets/generated for dish images, including: frontend/public/assets/generated/masala-dosa.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/idly-sambar.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/chettinad-chicken.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/prawn-biryani.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/fish-curry.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/ghee-roast-dosa.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/medu-vada.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/onion-uttapam.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/kothu-parotta.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/fish-moilee.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/sambar-rice.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/payasam.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/filter-coffee.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/coconut-water.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/butter-chicken.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/plain-parotta.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/mixed-veg-curry.dim_600x400.png.

requirements.summary: Implement horizontally scrollable category tabs with emoji icons on Menu page for filtering dishes by category
acceptanceCriteria: All menu categories appear as scrollable tabs
Selecting a tab filters the dish grid to show only items in that category
Active tab has clearly distinct styling

file_operations.description: Update MenuTabs to display all 9 South Indian menu categories (Starters, Dosas & Uttapam, Idly & Vada, Rice & Biryani, Curries & Gravies, Breads, Seafood Specials, Desserts, Drinks) with appropriate emoji icons. Ensure horizontal scroll behavior works smoothly and active tab styling uses the new saffron/turmeric palette.

Update Menu page to integrate the updated MenuTabs component and ensure category filtering works correctly with the new 9-category structure from menuData.ts. Apply the South Indian color theme to the page layout.

requirements.summary: Render dish cards on Menu page with all required fields and Add to Cart functionality using generated images
acceptanceCriteria: Each dish card displays all required fields
Add to Cart button increments the cart count in the navbar
Veg items show a green badge; non-veg items show a red badge

file_operations.description: Update DishCard component to use the South Indian color palette for badges, borders, and button styling. Ensure veg badge is green and non-veg badge is red. Verify dish images use the full workspace path from frontend/public/assets/generated with .dim_600x400 dimensions as specified in menuData.ts. Ensure Add to Cart button integrates with CartContext and updates the navbar badge count.

requirements.summary: Implement shopping cart with localStorage persistence, navbar badge, and multi-step checkout flow with order confirmation
acceptanceCriteria: Cart persists across page refreshes using localStorage
Navbar shows cart item count badge
Checkout flow has steps: order type → address → payment → confirmation
Order confirmation screen displays a summary of items ordered

file_operations.description: Update Cart page styling to use the South Indian color palette for item cards, buttons, and empty state messaging. Ensure quantity controls and remove buttons are clearly visible with the new theme.

Update Checkout page to apply South Indian theme colors throughout the multi-step flow (order type selection, address entry, payment method, confirmation). Ensure form fields, step indicators, and CTA buttons use saffron/turmeric accents on cream/charcoal backgrounds. Verify order confirmation screen displays all order details clearly.
Ensure the cart badge in the Navbar correctly reflects the item count from CartContext. Style the badge with a saffron or deep red background to stand out against the navbar theme.

requirements.summary: Build full-screen hero section on homepage with South Indian food background, restaurant name, tagline, and CTA buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is full viewport height
Restaurant name and tagline are clearly visible over the background
CTA buttons link correctly to /menu and /reservation

file_operations.description: Update HeroSection to use the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png. Update restaurant name to 'Coal & Curry' and tagline to reflect South Indian multi-cuisine dining (e.g., 'Authentic South Indian Multi-Cuisine Experience'). Style CTA buttons with saffron/turmeric colors and ensure they link to /menu and /reservation. Apply warm overlay gradient using the new palette.

requirements.summary: Create Restaurant Details / Contact page with business info, opening hours, social links, and contact form
acceptanceCriteria: Address, phone, email, and opening hours are all displayed
WhatsApp link opens a WhatsApp chat
Contact form has name, email, and message fields with a submit confirmation state

file_operations.description: Update Contact page styling to use the South Indian color palette. Ensure all contact details (address, phone, email, WhatsApp link, social media) are displayed with good readability against the new background colors. Update the contact form styling with saffron/turmeric accents and ensure the success confirmation state is visually distinct.

requirements.summary: Build table reservation page with comprehensive form fields and backend storage, displaying confirmation summary on success
acceptanceCriteria: All required form fields are validated before submission
Reservation is saved to backend stable storage
Confirmation summary is displayed after successful submission

file_operations.description: Update Reservation page styling to use the South Indian color palette for form fields, labels, and submit button. Ensure form validation errors are displayed with appropriate contrast. Style the confirmation summary section with a warm, welcoming design using cream/saffron tones. The backend submitReservation method from backend/main.mo is already available via useQueries.ts.

requirements.summary: Add Signature Dishes section on homepage showcasing 4 featured South Indian specialties with images and Add to Cart buttons
acceptanceCriteria: 4 signature dishes are displayed in a grid on the homepage
Each card has an image, name, description, price, and Add to Cart button
Section links to the full menu page

file_operations.description: Replace the existing signature dishes with 4 South Indian specialties: Ghee Roast Dosa (frontend/public/assets/generated/ghee-roast-dosa.dim_600x400.png), Chettinad Pepper Chicken (frontend/public/assets/generated/chettinad-chicken.dim_600x400.png), Prawn Masala (frontend/public/assets/generated/prawn-biryani.dim_600x400.png), and Filter Coffee Dessert Platter (frontend/public/assets/generated/filter-coffee.dim_600x400.png). Update card styling to use the South Indian color palette with saffron/turmeric accents. Ensure each card includes name, short description, price, and an Add to Cart button that integrates with CartContext.
Ensure the Home page correctly renders the updated SignatureDishes component and applies the South Indian theme consistently across all homepage sections.

requirements.summary: Add customer reviews carousel on homepage fetching from backend with star ratings and static fallback data
acceptanceCriteria: Reviews are fetched from backend with at least 4 static fallback entries
Star ratings are visually rendered
Carousel navigation (prev/next) works correctly

file_operations.description: Update CustomerReviews component to use the South Indian color palette for review cards, star ratings, and navigation buttons. Ensure the component fetches reviews from backend via useQueries.ts (getTopReviews) and falls back to at least 4 static South Indian cuisine-themed reviews if backend is unavailable. Style carousel controls with saffron/turmeric accents.

requirements.summary: Add SEO metadata to all pages with title, meta description, Open Graph tags, JSON-LD Restaurant schema, and update robots.txt/sitemap.xml
acceptanceCriteria: Each page has a unique title and meta description
Homepage includes JSON-LD Restaurant schema
robots.txt allows all crawlers except /cart and /checkout
sitemap.xml lists all public routes

file_operations.description: Update SEOHead component to ensure all pages have unique titles and descriptions reflecting 'Coal & Curry - South Indian Multi-Cuisine Restaurant'. Update the JSON-LD Restaurant schema on the homepage to include South Indian cuisine type, Coal & Curry branding, and accurate business details.

Ensure the Home page includes SEOHead with the Restaurant JSON-LD structured data block. Verify Open Graph tags include the generated images (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png or frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_400x400.png).
Add SEOHead to Menu page with unique title 'South Indian Multi-Cuisine Menu | Coal & Curry' and description mentioning the 9 menu categories.
Add or update SEOHead in About page with unique title and description about Coal & Curry's South Indian culinary heritage.
Add or update SEOHead in Reservation page with unique title 'Book a Table | Coal & Curry' and relevant description.
Add or update SEOHead in Contact page with unique title 'Contact Us | Coal & Curry' and description including contact methods.
Add or update SEOHead in Gallery page with unique title 'Photo Gallery | Coal & Curry' and description highlighting South Indian food and ambiance.
Add or update SEOHead in Offers page with unique title 'Special Offers | Coal & Curry' and description of current promotions.
Add or update SEOHead in Blog page with unique title 'Blog | Coal & Curry' and description about South Indian cuisine articles.
Verify robots.txt disallows /cart and /checkout while allowing all other routes. Ensure sitemap URL is correct.

Verify sitemap.xml lists all public routes (/, /menu, /about, /gallery, /offers, /reservation, /blog, /contact, /loyalty) with appropriate lastmod dates and priority values. Remove /cart and /checkout if present.

requirements.summary: Include floating chatbot widget ('Agni' assistant) with keyword-based responses for common restaurant queries
acceptanceCriteria: Chatbot toggle button is visible on all pages
Chatbot responds correctly to at least 8 keyword topics
Quick-reply shortcut buttons are available

file_operations.description: Update ChatbotWidget styling to use saffron/turmeric colors for the floating toggle button. Ensure the button is fixed to the bottom-right and stands out with the South Indian theme.
Update ChatbotPanel styling to use the South Indian color palette for chat bubbles, input field, and quick-reply buttons. Ensure the 'Agni' assistant branding uses warm colors and the fire emoji.

Verify chatbotResponses.ts includes at least 8 keyword-based responses covering menu, hours, reservation, delivery, location, offers, payment, and specialties. Update response content to reflect Coal & Curry's South Indian multi-cuisine offering and business details.
Ensure ChatbotWidget is rendered in the Layout component so it appears on all pages of the application.

requirements.summary: Add responsive Navbar with scroll-aware styling, mobile hamburger menu, cart badge, and links to all main pages
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is responsive and collapses to hamburger on mobile
Cart badge shows correct item count
Navbar styling changes on scroll (e.g., transparent to solid background)

file_operations.description: Update Navbar to use the South Indian color palette with scroll-aware styling (warm gradient or solid saffron/charcoal background on scroll). Ensure all navigation links (Home, Menu, About, Gallery, Offers, Reservations, Blog, Contact) are present and styled consistently. Verify cart badge displays the correct count from CartContext and uses a high-contrast color (deep red or saffron). Ensure mobile hamburger menu works correctly and uses the new theme colors.

requirements.summary: Add site-wide Footer with brand info, navigation links, contact details, and newsletter signup form with backend integration
acceptanceCriteria: Footer appears on all pages
Newsletter form shows success, duplicate, or error feedback
All navigation links in footer are functional

file_operations.description: Update Footer to use the South Indian color palette with a warm background (deep red or dark charcoal) and cream text. Ensure all quick navigation links, menu category links, social media icons, and contact details are styled consistently with the theme. Verify NewsletterSignup component is embedded and styled appropriately.

Update NewsletterSignup component to use the South Indian color palette for input field, submit button, and feedback messages. Ensure it calls the backend subscribeNewsletter method via useQueries.ts and displays success, duplicate, or error states with appropriate styling using saffron/turmeric accents.
Ensure Footer is rendered in the Layout component so it appears consistently across all pages of the application.
